mapper.select: SELECT * FROM group_link WHERE link_url = #{url} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_link (link_url, group_name, label_id, import_batch_id, origin, membership_state, remark, created_at, updated_at, created_by) VALUES (#{linkUrl}, #{groupName}, #{labelId}, #{importBatchId}, COALESCE(#{origin}, 1), COALESCE(#{membershipState}, 1), #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE group_link SET deleted_at = NULL, label_id = #{labelId}, import_batch_id = #{batchId}, group_name = COALESCE(#{groupName}, group_name), updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE group_link SET label_id = #{labelId}, import_batch_id = #{batchId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND label_id IS NULL

sql.if: AND ( g.group_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.wa_subject LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR g.link_url LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.owner_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.admin LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.source_file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

AND ( g.group_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.wa_subject LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR g.link_url LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.owner_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.source_file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM join_task_result r WHERE r.is_admin = 1 AND r.group_jid = p.group_jid AND r.group_jid IS NOT NULL AND r.group_jid != '' AND r.account LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) )

mapper.sql: FROM group_link g LEFT JOIN group_link_import_batch b ON g.import_batch_id = b.id LEFT JOIN group_link_preview p ON p.group_link_id = g.id LEFT JOIN group_link_health h ON h.group_link_id = g.id

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT group_jid, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT account ORDER BY account SEPARATOR ', ') AS admin FROM join_task_result WHERE is_admin = 1 AND group_jid IS NOT NULL AND group_jid != '' GROUP BY group_jid ) a ON a.group_jid = p.group_jid
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM group_link WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT g.id AS groupLinkId, p.group_jid AS groupJid FROM group_link g LEFT JOIN group_link_preview p ON p.tenant_id = g.tenant_id AND p.group_link_id = g.id WHERE g.deleted_at IS NULL AND g.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT tenantId, groupLinkId, groupJid, accountId, protocolAccountId FROM ( SELECT g.tenant_id AS tenantId, g.id AS groupLinkId, p.group_jid AS groupJid, a.id AS accountId, a.protocol_account_id AS protocolAccountId, h.last_check_at AS lastCheckAt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY g.tenant_id, g.id ORDER BY r.is_admin DESC, r.id ASC ) AS rowNo FROM group_link g INNER JOIN group_link_preview p ON p.tenant_id = g.tenant_id AND p.group_link_id = g.id INNER JOIN join_task_result r ON r.tenant_id = g.tenant_id AND r.group_jid = p.group_jid AND r.status = 'SUCCESS' AND r.account_id IS NOT NULL INNER JOIN account a ON a.tenant_id = r.tenant_id AND a.id = r.account_id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.protocol_account_id IS NOT NULL AND a.protocol_account_id != '' INNER JOIN account_state s ON s.tenant_id = a.tenant_id AND s.account_id = a.id AND s.login_state = #{onlineLoginState} LEFT JOIN group_link_health h ON h.tenant_id = g.tenant_id AND h.group_link_id = g.id WHERE g.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.group_jid IS NOT NULL AND p.group_jid != '' AND (h.is_banned IS NULL OR h.is_banned = 0) ) ranked WHERE rowNo = 1 ORDER BY COALESCE(lastCheckAt, 0) ASC, groupLinkId ASC LIMIT #{limit}

select.if: SELECT * FROM group_link WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND id IN #{i}

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_link WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND id IN #{i}
